caption: Accumulated matched-template SNR for PCI and DGI at a nominal 30% condensate-depletion budget. Panel (a) uses the identical-frame clean-loss limit with the same fixed ROI and image observable; panel (b) accumulates frame-dependent SNR as sqrt(sum_i SNR_i^2) over the integer frames accepted by the heating- and reabsorption-aware sequence. Each frame regenerates the Thomas-Fermi state, phase map, Fourier image, and camera-level photon/read variance. Results are representative Version 1 outputs and are not experimentally calibrated; technical noise, reference-image noise, and density-updated reabsorption remain omitted.
figure_type: clean-loss matched-ROI reference versus evolving heating-aware multishot accumulated SNR

observable_design.read_variance: 7 e- rms squared per binned camera pixel
observable_design.reference_image_noise: not included, matching the notebook convention of a known reference background
observable_design.shot_variance: total expected atom-image photons in each ROI pixel

physics_model.image_update: full complex phase field propagated through the configured Fourier pupil
physics_model.reabsorption: initial-density angle-averaged notebook fraction, held fixed within each sequence
physics_model.state_update: Thomas-Fermi state regenerated from evolving N0

stopping_semantics.acceptance_rule: include a frame only when the post-pulse state remains within the threshold
stopping_semantics.accepted_frame_state: pre-pulse state after frame_index prior pulses
